F116 Words in rule 12.66(1) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 9(15)(b) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F117 Words in rule 12.66(2) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 9(15)(b) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


F118 Words in rule 12.66(4) omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 9(15)(b) (with reg. 23 ) (as amended by S.I. 2020/1493 , regs. 1(1) , 8(2)(b) ); 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


#### Service of the court's order or request relating to transfer of jurisdiction under F119 ...the 1996 Hague Convention E+W


12.67. The court officer will serve an order or request relating to transfer of jurisdiction on all parties, the Central Authority of the other F120 ... Contracting State, and the [ F121 domestic Central Authority ] .


Textual Amendments
